basic_details.job_title: ABV-IIITM Gwalior Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: ABV Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior
basic_details.short_information: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior (ABV-IIITM Gwalior) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 01 July 2026 on the official website of ABV-IIITM Gwalior. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ABV-IIITM Gwalior Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Bachelor's and First Class Masters' degree in Computer Science / Information Technology/Artificial Intelligence/ Data Science or equivalent as recognized by AICTE or CFTIs
qualification.details: First Class Bachelor's and First Class Masters' degree in Computer Science / Information Technology/Artificial Intelligence/ Data Science or equivalent as recognized by AICTE or CFTIs.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ABV-IIITM Gwalior to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ABV-IIITM Gwalior Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ABV-IIITM Gwalior to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ABV-IIITM Gwalior Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ABV-IIITM Gwalior JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at ABV-IIITM Gwalior is 22nd July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First Class Bachelor's and a First Class Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence, or Data Science, or an equivalent qualification recognized by AICTE or CFTIs.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow post will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at ABV Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where is ABV-IIITM Gwalior located?
faq.answer: ABV Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior is located in Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this JRF position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at ABV-IIITM Gwalior is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official online portal.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for ABV-IIITM Gwalior?
faq.answer: The official website for ABV Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior is www.iiitm.ac.in, where you can find more information and updates.
